title: Home row: a s d f j k l
description: Master the home row - your fingers' resting position
text: asdf jkl asdf jkl ask sad lad fall salad flask

tips.text: This is the first lesson, and the most important thing in it is not the letters. It is where your hands sit. The home row is your desk, and everything you ever type starts from there. Learn to find it without looking, and half the work is already done.

Rest the left hand on A S D F and the right on J K L, fingers in that order from the outside in. Feel the two small ridges on F and J - your index fingers anchor there, so you can always find your way home in the dark. Thumbs hover over the space bar.

tips.title: Eyes off the keys
tips.text: The easy cheat is to glance down, then place a finger. Try not to. Find the keys by feel, the way you find a light switch in a familiar room. Look at the keyboard and you lose the thread - in the newsroom we learned that the hard way, on deadline.

tips.target: asdf jkl asdf jkl asdf jkl asdf jkl asdf jkl asdf jkl asdf jkl asdf jkl asdf jkl asdf jkl
tips.title: Set your hands
tips.hint: Set all eight fingers on the home row and press across it in order, blind. Ten passes - this is where the position settles in.

tips.text: Hands in place - good. Now we build the memory in the muscles: one finger at a time, plenty of repeats. Every key on this lesson lives on the home row, so nothing reaches up or down. Press cleanly, one calm beat per key, and keep your eyes off your hands.

tips.target: a s d f a s d f a s d f a s d f a s d f a s d f
tips.title: Left hand
tips.hint: Left hand across the home row: a (pinky), s (ring), d (middle), f (index). One space after each.

tips.target: j k l j k l j k l j k l j k l j k l j k l j k l
tips.title: Right hand
tips.hint: Right hand across the home row: j (index), k (middle), l (ring). One space after each.

tips.text: In the newsroom, accuracy came before speed. It still does. Speed arrives on its own once the accuracy holds steady.

tips.target: ask sad lad fall salad flask ask sad lad fall salad flask
tips.title: First words
tips.hint: Your first words, all from the home row: ask, sad, lad, fall, salad, flask.

tips.text: Every step done? Then press Open Trainer below and take one full run at the whole lesson text. That run is saved to your progress and opens the next lesson.

character_tips.anna: Home row is the foundation. Remember the finger positions: A-S-D-F and J-K-L. Accuracy first!
character_tips.maxim: Base position: index fingers on F and J (you can feel the bumps). All other fingers fall in order.
character_tips.knopych: HOME ROW! Battle stance! ASDF on the left, JKL on the right! Let's go! 🎮
character_tips.klavochka: Sunshine, your fingers live on ASDF and JKL - that's their home! 💖
